schema.description:
Request body for POST /api/ai/ping (ASK-213 smoke endpoint).
`prompt` is optional -- when omitted the handler asks GPT-4.1-
nano to reply "pong", which is enough to exercise SSE wiring
without burning tokens.

prompt.description: Override the default smoke prompt (defaults to "Reply with the single word 'pong'.").

schema.title: AIPingRequest
